2606.31694.title: RCT: A Robot-Collected Touch-Vision-Language Dataset for Tactile Generalization
2606.31694.paper_summary: For robots manipulating open-world objects, tactile representations must generalize to unseen materials. We introduce RCT (Robotic Contact Tactile), a robot-collected touch-vision-language dataset with 29,279 tactile frames from full robot presses on 122 industrial reference materials in 7 categories, recorded with three DIGIT sensors at multiple contact positions. RCT preserves each press as a contact sequence, enabling held-out evaluation across materials, categories, sensors, contact positions, and contact sequences. Frames from one press are strongly correlated: frame-random splits can place near-duplicate observations of the same physical interaction in both training and test. With the encoder held fixed, removing contact-sequence overlap reduces tactile-to-text Recall@1 by 17.7 percentage points. When materials are additionally held out at training time, performance drops sharply, leaving held-out-material Recall@1 at 25.1 +/- 6.1% averaged over three held-out draws. The public TVL/HCT split shows the same structure: every test contact sequence appears in training, and raw-pixel nearest neighbors recover the correct sequence in 98.3% of cases. Uniformly sampling a press improves contrastive training, and RCT-trained embeddings improve category probes on unseen materials. RCT makes contact-sequence-aware, held-out-material evaluation reproducible and exposes novel-material generalization as a central challenge for robotic tactile perception. The RCT dataset is open-sourced at https://faerber-lab.github.io/RCT/
2606.31694.paper_summary_zh: 對於操控開放世界物體的機器人，觸覺表示必須能夠對未見過的材料進行泛化。我們介紹了 RCT（機器人接觸觸覺），這是一個由機器人收集的觸覺-視覺-語言數據集，包含來自 122 種工業參考材料的 29,279 幀觸覺框架，這些材料分為 7 個類別，並使用三個 DIGIT 感測器在多個接觸位置進行記錄。RCT 將每次按壓保留為接觸序列，使得在材料、類別、感測器、接觸位置和接觸序列之間的保留評估成為可能。來自一次按壓的幀之間有很強的相關性：幀隨機拆分可能會將相同物理互動的近重複觀察放置在訓練和測試中。當編碼器保持固定時，移除接觸序列重疊會使觸覺到文本的 Recall@1 降低 17.7 個百分點。當材料在訓練時也被保留時，性能急劇下降，使得保留材料的 Recall@1 平均為 25.1 +/- 6.1%，這是基於三次保留抽樣的結果。公共的 TVL/HCT 拆分顯示出相同的結構：每個測試接觸序列都出現在訓練中，原始像素最近鄰在 98.3% 的情況下恢復了正確的序列。均勻抽樣一次按壓改善了對比訓練，而 RCT 訓練的嵌入在未見過的材料上改善了類別探測。RCT 使得接觸序列感知、保留材料的評估可重複，並將新材料的泛化暴露為機器人觸覺感知的一個核心挑戰。RCT 數據集已在 https://faerber-lab.github.io/RCT/ 開源。
2606.31694.author: Jingbo He et.al.
2606.31694.authors: Jingbo He, Michael Färber, Roberto Calandra
